title: Ent Tree has static creature and magic immunity

card.rawText: This creature is unaffected by creature effects and magic cards. This creature inflicts 2x Atk damage to any creature holding a weapon.

effect.value: Unaffected by creature effects and magic cards

plan.title: Ent Tree has static creature and magic immunity
plan.summary: Put Ent Tree on the field and verify the headless route recognizes its continuous immunity to creature effects and magic cards.

notes: Set Ent Tree as player_1 primary creature.
This fixture isolates Ent Tree's printed immunity clause; its weapon-target damage multiplier is covered separately.

steps: Set Ent Tree as player_1 primary creature.
Accept the while-on-field creature and magic immunity static rule.
manualVerification: Confirm future creature effects and magic cards cannot affect Ent Tree while it remains on the field.
riskNotes: This fixture validates static-rule recognition, not a full opposing effect targeting attempt.

coverageSuggestion.notes: Validate Ent Tree's continuous creature-effect and magic-card immunity.

runnerNotes: Create a dev match from plan.setup, execute plan.steps, then verify plan.expectedAssertions.
The deterministic engine and manual QA status remain source of truth.
